steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage says the Amman Stock Exchange focuses on local companies and reflects “economic circumstances that are ______ Jordan,” characterized as “unique, rapidly evolving local conditions.” The blank needs a phrase meaning particular to or specific to Jordan.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — irrelevant to: would mean the conditions have nothing to do with Jordan — the opposite of what the passage argues. ✗
  • Choice B — prohibitive in: would mean the conditions make investing too costly or restrictive in Jordan. The passage frames the local focus as a benefit, not a barrier. ✗
  • Choice C — distinctive to: means particular or unique to Jordan, directly matching “unique, rapidly evolving local conditions.” ✓
  • Choice D — unchanging in: directly contradicts “rapidly evolving.” ✗
That confirms C is correct.
